title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. barbatum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. barbatum, also known as Rock Rose, is a type of flowering plant in the Cistaceae family, characterized by its pink to purple flowers and hairy leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rock Rose include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various conditions. Rock Rose is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of creams, ointments, or salves.
